mapper.select: SELECT id, reconciliation_id AS reconciliationId, settlement_id AS settlementId, deduction_type AS deductionType, deduction_amount AS deductionAmount, description, source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, tenant_id AS tenantId, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM t_deduction_item WHERE reconciliation_id = #{reconciliationId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id
